# FinDash — CodeDNA Project Summary

**Generated by CodeDNA** · fintech archetype · dashboard UI style

## DNA

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Project | FinDash |
| Archetype | `fintech` |
| Frontend | Next.js 14 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS |
| Backend | NestJS + TypeScript |
| Database | PostgreSQL via Prisma (amounts in cents) |
| Cache | Redis (price quotes, 5s TTL) |
| Message Queue | Kafka (price feed events) |
| Auth | JWT + Bearer token |
| Testing | Jest + NestJS Testing |
| UI Style | `dashboard` — dark zinc, metric cards, data-dense tables |
| Tax Method | FIFO |
| Tasks | 19 total · 19 completed |

## Financial DNA Rules

- All monetary amounts stored as **integers (cents)** — never floats
- **Idempotency key** on every mutating trade request
- All financial operations inside **PostgreSQL transactions**
- **FIFO tax-lot** allocation — oldest lots consumed first on SELL
- Trades are **append-only** — no UPDATE or DELETE on trades table
- **Double-entry ledger** — every debit has a matching credit

## Quick Start

```bash
yarn docker:up    # start PostgreSQL + Redis + Kafka
yarn db:migrate   # run Prisma migrations
yarn dev          # start API (3001) + Web (3000)
```
